tracks.meaning: to perform duties or functions in a specified role or capacity
to present food or drinks to someone at a meal or gathering
to hit a ball or shuttlecock across a net in tennis, badminton, or volleyball
to comply with or fulfill the requirements of a legal document, sentence, or court order
to provide military service or enlist in the armed forces
to provide goods or services to a client or customer
to provide or make available data, files, or functionality in a computer system
to deliver a penalty kick, throw, or stroke in sports competition
to move a ball into play or put a ball in motion during a game or sport
to be adequate, suitable, or acceptable for a particular purpose
